intent: Use matched-filter strength as a provisional promotion boundary for lag_memory_const_vol before any block21 repair, aggregation cycle, or market-facing transfer.

selected_precondition.meaning: Candidate split is promotable only if local lag-map memory contrast is strong enough before block21 admission is tested. This is not a hard evidence or impossibility boundary.

boundary_crystallization.interpretation: Rejected positives are above controls on local lag traces, but are not promotion-grade under the current robust null contract. Keep below-gate survivors visible as exceptions; do not tune them away silently.

must_do: Use the selected precondition as a provisional promotion threshold, not a hard evidence boundary.
Keep below-gate robust survivors visible with raw counts.
Preserve iid_const_vol, drift_const_vol and vol_only controls in any follow-up.
Retain iid, block5 and block21 nulls.
Before any sub-gate rescue attempt, specify a new measurable mechanism that explains the rejected robust survivors.
must_not_do: Broaden window or split-jitter tuning before testing this gate.
Treat below-gate cases as impossible or evidence-free.
Add another same-family repair layer just to recover rejected positives.
Treat the precondition as a market claim.
Use the gate to issue trading advice.

selected_followup_branch.reason: After the synthetic promotion boundary is visible in UI and explainable by THIA/Lab Assistant, complete one value-facing real-market E2E before using finance as meta-lab comparison target.
required_shape: Use real data through market_data/exp_regime_shift only, preserving data_card.
Run at least one current window plus shifted or adjacent controls.
Report DND_DELTA as local diagnostic only unless recurrence/out-of-sample gates pass.
Expose the artifact through latest_diagnostic/dashboard before any product claim.
selected_followup_branch.result: The reference real-market E2E is complete as a negative constraint: exact-window transfer and SPY recurrence classify current_iid_partial with operational=false, public_claim=false and trading_signal=false.
selected_followup_branch.next_gate: Use exact-window recurrence artifacts as authority after transfer rejection. If only the current SPY window passes iid/block5 and no window passes block21, classify current_iid_partial and suspend cluster or recurrence promotion.
selected_followup_branch.after_result_policy: Do not relaunch transfer or recurrence on the same SPY current-window premise. Future REAL_MARKET_TRANSFER_DIAGNOSTIC work must predeclare a materially new object/mechanism and falsifier, or yield to meta-lab comparison against docs/FINANCE_REFERENCE_E2E_20260517.md.

retire_when: The precondition fails to keep controls below the 5% selection or robust ceiling.
The precondition does not keep admitted positive robust recovery above 70% in an independent calibration run.
A block-preserving null reproduces the admitted-positive signal.
